headline: Is Fair Isaac (FICO) Now Offering Value After Sharp Share Price Pullback
summary: If you are wondering whether Fair Isaac at around US$1,092 per share is priced for perfection or offering a margin of safety, the starting point is to look closely at what the current valuation is actually implying. The stock has been volatile, with a 2.8% move over the last 7 days, a 24.2% decline over 30 days, a 33.5% decline year to date, and a 40.9% decline over 1 year, set against longer term returns of 59.6% over 3 years and 109.4% over 5 years. headline: Growing Concerns of Competition Hurt Fair Isaac Corporation (FICO)
summary: ClearBridge Investments, a global equity manager, recently published first-quarter 2026 commentary for its “Large Cap Growth Strategy”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here.
